meaning: n.试验,假设adj.试验性的,试探的,尝试的,暂定的
examples: We made a tentative arrangement to meet on Friday.
I'm taking the first tentative steps towards fitness.
In one fell swoop the bank wiped away the tentative benefits of this policy.
Their tentative success has, not surprisingly, given fresh impetus to demands for other new states.
But impeccable judgement outside off-stump and a slice or two of luck saw him through those tentative beginnings.
